## Meeting Purpose

[Prepare agenda and content for upcoming GrowthX x Webflow AEO webinar](https://fathom.video/share/BJK-TVkhFvoY1122bmy-A6PfSzqvVT3j?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Guy and Marcel will collaborate on a unified presentation, combining Webflow's AEO framework with GrowthX's content strategy insights](https://fathom.video/share/BJK-TVkhFvoY1122bmy-A6PfSzqvVT3j?tab=summary&timestamp=1948.0)
  - [The webinar will focus on actionable AEO strategies, emphasizing audience understanding and high-quality content creation](https://fathom.video/share/BJK-TVkhFvoY1122bmy-A6PfSzqvVT3j?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Guy will present in-person at GrowthX's office, allowing for a more cohesive presentation setup](https://fathom.video/share/BJK-TVkhFvoY1122bmy-A6PfSzqvVT3j?tab=summary&timestamp=2359.0)

## Topics

### Webinar Structure and Content

  - [Guy will present Webflow's AEO framework, covering 4 key categories: content, authority, technical, and measurement](https://fathom.video/share/BJK-TVkhFvoY1122bmy-A6PfSzqvVT3j?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [Marcel/Jason will follow with GrowthX's approach to content strategy and quality for AEO](https://fathom.video/share/BJK-TVkhFvoY1122bmy-A6PfSzqvVT3j?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
  - [The presentation will transition from Guy's overview to GrowthX's detailed content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/BJK-TVkhFvoY1122bmy-A6PfSzqvVT3j?tab=summary&timestamp=1995.0)
  - [Both teams will use real examples, including Webflow case studies and GrowthX's work for clients](https://fathom.video/share/BJK-TVkhFvoY1122bmy-A6PfSzqvVT3j?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)

### AEO Strategy Insights

  - [Shift focus from keywords to answering audience questions throughout the funnel](https://fathom.video/share/BJK-TVkhFvoY1122bmy-A6PfSzqvVT3j?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Emphasize the importance of understanding target customers and their jobs to be done](https://fathom.video/share/BJK-TVkhFvoY1122bmy-A6PfSzqvVT3j?tab=summary&timestamp=896.0)
  - [Highlight the need for high-quality, comprehensive content that addresses multiple angles](https://fathom.video/share/BJK-TVkhFvoY1122bmy-A6PfSzqvVT3j?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [Discuss the impact of content on non-branded citations and AI-generated responses](https://fathom.video/share/BJK-TVkhFvoY1122bmy-A6PfSzqvVT3j?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)

### Collaboration Process

  - [Teams will work on a shared Google Slides deck to refine the presentation](https://fathom.video/share/BJK-TVkhFvoY1122bmy-A6PfSzqvVT3j?tab=summary&timestamp=2282.0)
  - [Guy will adapt his presentation to tee up GrowthX's content more effectively](https://fathom.video/share/BJK-TVkhFvoY1122bmy-A6PfSzqvVT3j?tab=summary&timestamp=2041.0)
  - [Both parties aim to create a unified narrative that showcases their complementary expertise](https://fathom.video/share/BJK-TVkhFvoY1122bmy-A6PfSzqvVT3j?tab=summary&timestamp=1995.0)

### Webinar Logistics

  - [The event will be held at GrowthX's office with their A/V setup](https://fathom.video/share/BJK-TVkhFvoY1122bmy-A6PfSzqvVT3j?tab=summary&timestamp=2359.0)
  - [Guy will arrive early to finalize details in person](https://fathom.video/share/BJK-TVkhFvoY1122bmy-A6PfSzqvVT3j?tab=summary&timestamp=2629.0)
  - [Teams are comfortable with last-minute adjustments if needed](https://fathom.video/share/BJK-TVkhFvoY1122bmy-A6PfSzqvVT3j?tab=summary&timestamp=2472.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to set up shared Google Slides deck for collaborative editing](https://fathom.video/share/BJK-TVkhFvoY1122bmy-A6PfSzqvVT3j?tab=summary&timestamp=2282.0)
  - [Jason to send Guy links to previous GrowthX workshops for reference](https://fathom.video/share/BJK-TVkhFvoY1122bmy-A6PfSzqvVT3j?tab=summary&timestamp=2515.0)
  - [Teams to iterate on slide content and transitions asynchronously](https://fathom.video/share/BJK-TVkhFvoY1122bmy-A6PfSzqvVT3j?tab=summary&timestamp=2416.0)
  - [Finalize presentation details when Guy arrives at GrowthX office on Friday](https://fathom.video/share/BJK-TVkhFvoY1122bmy-A6PfSzqvVT3j?tab=summary&timestamp=2629.0)
  - [Consider future collaboration opportunities for similar events](https://fathom.video/share/BJK-TVkhFvoY1122bmy-A6PfSzqvVT3j?tab=summary&timestamp=2421.0)
